train_description: Stabilize and unify FermatMind discoverability truth across sitemap, llms, canonical, metadata, JSON-LD, robots/noindex, hreflang, Evidence Container, URL truth, and SEO authority ownership.

authority_rules: backend owns SEO and discoverability truth
never invent frontend SEO fallback authority
never silently widen sitemap or llms exposure
never expose private take result order share flows

continue_train_when: blocker is unrelated to the current PR
no new P0 or P1 issue is introduced

merge_ready_if: no new P0 or P1 issue is introduced
discoverability truth improves or remains stable
unrelated existing debt is documented as sidecar
must_block_on: canonical drift introduced by current PR
SEO truth split introduced by current PR
schema authority regression introduced by current PR
Evidence Container breakage introduced by current PR

PR-DF-01.scope: Discoverability regression snapshot for sitemap, llms, private-flow exposure, canonical, hreflang, and JSON-LD parity without runtime SEO behavior changes.

PR-DF-02.scope: URL exposure policy inventory and contract for sitemap, llms, robots/noindex, canonical, hreflang, and private-flow exposure rules.

PR-DF-03.scope: Align llms test URL enumeration with backend-owned test/catalog or sitemap-source authority without silent exposure widening.

PR-DF-04.scope: Reconcile JSON-LD structured data contracts with backend SEO authority and visible page evidence.

PR-DF-05.scope: Add generated and sampled live parity gates for canonical, hreflang, robots/indexability posture, and JSON-LD URL references.

local: pnpm lint failed with unrelated pre-existing repo-wide lint debt

sidecar_issues.title: Pre-existing repo-wide lint debt outside PR-DF-05 scope
sidecar_issues.scope_impact: Full pnpm lint reports existing issues in untouched files; scoped eslint for PR-DF-05 files passed.
sidecar_issues.recommended_future_phase: Repository lint hygiene sidecar outside Discoverability Foundation PR-DF-05
sidecar_issues.evidence: Untouched lint failures include components/career/CareerShortlistAction.tsx, components/result/mbti/clone/MbtiCloneAssetSlot.tsx, ecosystem.config.cjs, lib/cms/last-known-good.ts, and existing contract test files.

PR-DF-06.scope: Document and enforce page-family CMS SEO completeness requirements for seo.surface.v1, sitemap-source, indexability, llms exposure, canonical, structured data, and Evidence Container readiness.

PR-DF-07.scope: Add page-family Evidence Container readiness gates for visible evidence-rich answer blocks before Topic Graph or GEO expansion.

PR-DF-08.scope: Extract duplicated sitemap, llms, robots/noindex, canonical, and private-flow deny/gate rules into shared discoverability policy utilities after regression coverage exists.
